name: @repo/performance-tests
description: Enterprise K6 performance tests for luyen-thi-lai-xe-microservices

scripts.test:smoke: pnpm build && k6 run dist/smoke.js -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 -e K6_SCENARIO=smoke --out influxdb=http://localhost:8086/k6
scripts.test:load: pnpm build && k6 run dist/load.js -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 -e K6_SCENARIO=load --out influxdb=http://localhost:8086/k6
scripts.test:soak: pnpm build && k6 run dist/soak.js -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 -e K6_SCENARIO=soak -e SOAK_DURATION=10m --out influxdb=http://localhost:8086/k6
scripts.test:soak:full: pnpm build && k6 run dist/soak.js -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 -e K6_SCENARIO=soak-full -e SOAK_DURATION=2h --out influxdb=http://localhost:8086/k6
scripts.test:security: pnpm build && k6 run dist/security.js -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 -e K6_SCENARIO=security --out influxdb=http://localhost:8086/k6
scripts.test:smoke:no-influx: pnpm build && k6 run dist/smoke.js -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000
scripts.test:load:no-influx: pnpm build && k6 run dist/load.js -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000
